node.statement: ESTIMATE (5.2): ||P(h o (t o u))|| <= C sqrt(eta)||r|| ||s|| ||t|| ||u||, where h=h_{r,s} and t,u in A. Decompose t o u=P(t o u)+h_{t,u} (def-square-hole: h_{t,u}:=t o u-P(t o u), so this is an exact identity). By real-linearity of the Jordan product in its second slot and of P (GT-Pprops): P(h o (t o u))=P(h o P(t o u))+P(h o h_{t,u}). FIRST piece [proved in child 1.3.1]: ||P(h o P(t o u))|| <= C sqrt(eta)||r|| ||s|| ||t|| ||u||. SECOND piece [proved in child 1.3.2]: ||P(h o h_{t,u})|| <= C eta||r|| ||s|| ||t|| ||u||, which is <= C sqrt(eta)||r|| ||s|| ||t|| ||u|| since eta=sqrt(eta)*sqrt(eta) <= sqrt(eta) for eta<=eta_0<1/4<1. Adding the two (triangle inequality, GT-bh-cstar) gives (5.2) with constant absorbed.
